name: Jorge Moreira
title: Senior Software Engineer
bio: I'm a Senior Software Engineer based in Porto with 7+ years of experience designing and building backend systems across e-commerce and fintech.

I specialise in backend engineering: distributed architectures, event-driven services, cloud infrastructure, and observability — currently contributing to a production payments platform that handles transactions across multiple markets.
Equally comfortable diving deep into a complex distributed system, leading technical discussions, driving API design standards across teams, or investing in the growth of the engineers around me.
carePriorities: Systems that are observable by default — in fintech, surprises in production are not an option
API design as a shared discipline, not an afterthought bolted on after the fact
Writing code the next engineer can read, understand, and confidently evolve
Bridging legacy and modern — keeping the lights on while moving forward
Creating space for the engineers around me to take real ownership and grow
interests: Owned by a black cat — who, for the record, is not named GitHub
Volunteer when time allows — giving back matters
Photography as a way to slow down and notice things
Surfing, camping, and long walks through the countryside
Music and cinema for when the screen needs to be someone else's
Sports are non-negotiable — movement is part of the routine
